name: BIM2BEM HVAC route (BIM2Graph - plain Python, source included)
postCreateCommand:
pip install -r bim2bem-hvac/bim2graph/requirements.txt && mkdir -p bim2bem-hvac/cases_in bim2bem-hvac/cases_out && chmod +x bim2bem-hvac/codespace_run_bim2graph.sh && printf '
Codespace ready. cd bim2bem-hvac, upload an IFC file into cases_in/, then run ./codespace_run_bim2graph.sh cases_in/your_model.ifc
'
